The `/run-pipeline` command requires a neighborhood name. Usage:

```
/run-pipeline "Neighborhood Name"
/run-pipeline --all        # run all neighborhoods
/run-pipeline --list       # list available neighborhoods
```

**Common neighborhoods:**
- Alcova Heights
- Lyon Park
- Nauck
- Barcroft

To see all available neighborhoods from the data:

```bash
/c/Users/johnb/Advocacy/tdranalysis/venv/Scripts/python scripts/run_analysis.py --list-neighborhoods --skip-download
```
